calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. Bailiff: J. Cappozoli.

Petitioner: Leon Jourdan Williams present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Shenika Shaw.

Mr. Williams was sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: Leon Jourdan Williams, his Residence, and his Vehicle.

Respondent shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Expires October 28, 2012

Order signed in open court.
